text: The maneuvering vessel normally berths on which side during STS operations?

options.text: As instructed by the mother vessel **Correct answer : Starboard side to**

explanation: During Ship-to-Ship (STS) transfer operations, the maneuvering vessel (the ship coming alongside) typically berths on the starboard side of the mother vessel. This allows the master on the maneuvering ship to use the standard bridge layout, where the conning position favors starboard-side maneuvering.
